result:
**Goal: Add a Fluid Dynamics (Navier-Stokes) simulation mode.**

This project is a massive terminal-based simulation engine with 60+ modes spanning physics, biology, math, and more. It already has smoke/fire and wave simulations, but lacks a proper 2D fluid dynamics solver. A Navier-Stokes fluid sim would add interactive real-time fluid flow with velocity fields, pressure solving, and dye advection — visualized as colored currents in the terminal. The user could inject fluid with the cursor and watch vortices and turbulence form. This fills a natural gap in the physics simulation lineup.
